name: Metavesco, Inc.
summary: PART I The Company was incorporated in the Commonwealth of Virginia on July 13, 1993, and was a closed-end investment company licensed by the Small Business Administration (the SBA) as a Small Business Investment Company (SBIC). The Company previously made equity investments in and provided loans to small businesses to finance their growth, expansion, and development.
